question: Propose a not-thought-of-yet or new compound to treat complex-I mitochondrial diseases, from public data.

steps.result: NDUFS4 high in muscle, cultured fibroblasts (115.8 TPM), nerve, artery
P/LP (excl. conflicting): NDUFV1 68, NDUFS1 50, NDUFS4 47, ACAD9 184, NDUFAF5 118, FOXRED1 62, NUBPL 20; mtDNA MT-ND5 1711 (release 2026-06-06)
Titov LbNOX 27124460; Sullivan 26232225; Birsoy 26232224; hypoxia 26917594; modifier compendium 31730859
NOT-RUN: CLUE.io proxy-blocked 403 + GSE92742/70138 ~40GB infeasible in available RAM; no connectivity scores fabricated
466 direction-concordant genes across 2 labs; Spearman rho=0.294; 77% concordance; NDI1 rescue arm changes only 4 genes (matches PMID 32574562 'rescues lifespan not ataxia')
anchor = down AKR1B1/B10/E1 (reactive-aldehyde detox loss); ACSL4/6 down read as compensatory (ACSL4 pro-ferroptotic); node = lipid peroxidation / reductive stress
3 lines: (1) signature detox-loss, (2) GPX4 synthetic-lethal To2019 31730859, (3) patient fibroblast Nrf2/selenoprotein 22033105
edaravone CID 4021 CHEMBL290916 InChIKey QELUYTUMUWHWMC-UHFFFAOYSA-N; drug-like size + low logP + approved CNS drug; phase 4 approved 2017
edaravone x 'complex I deficiency'=0, x Ndufs4=0, x Leigh=1 (that 1 is MELAS SLE mgmt, not primary CI)
edaravone mild irritant only; deferiprone black-box agranulocytosis
tallied P/LP directly from variant records, excluding 'Conflicting classifications of pathogenicity'; NDUFV1 68, NDUFS1 50, NDUFS4 47, ACAD9 184, NDUFAF5 118, FOXRED1 62, NUBPL 20
confirmed each PMID supports its exact sentence; corrected PMID 18643790 (astrocytes/apoptotic, not neuronal ferroptosis) and PMID 40731203 title (Alzheimer's-like signatures, Alz & Dementia 2025)
PMID 38883711 (preprint): vatiquinone rescued RSL3 cell assay but FAILED to improve survival in Ndufs4 Leigh mouse in vivo; reshapes first experiment to require in-vivo tier
confirmed first authors To T-L (Cell 2019, 31730859) and Sullivan L B (Cell 2015, 26232225) for figure attribution

not_run: LINCS L1000 / CLUE.io connectivity (blocked + infeasible in available RAM)
